nasb.text: Now Sarai, Abram’s wife had borne him no children, and she had an Egyptian maid whose name was Hagar.

esv.text: Now Sarai, Abram’s wife, had borne him no children. She had a female Egyptian servant whose name was Hagar.

cnv.text: 亞伯蘭的妻子撒萊，沒有為他生孩子。撒萊卻有一個婢女，是埃及人，名叫夏甲。

ccb.text: 亚伯兰的妻子撒莱没有生育，她有个婢女名叫夏甲，是埃及人。

csbs.text: 亚伯兰的妻子撒莱没有为他生孩子。撒莱有一个埃及婢女，名叫夏甲。
